final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fantasy illustration
Asset type: epic fantasy oil painting, cinematic poster
Primary request: a silver-haired female alchemist in Victorian steampunk mechanical armor robes standing on a spiral staircase made of glowing crystals and brass gears, holding an ancient grimoire with breathing emerald dragon scales on the cover
Scene/backdrop: fantastical library fusing Byzantine domes, Gothic pointed arches, and Islamic geometric patterns; living starry ceiling dome where constellations shift and rearrange; floor covered by color-shifting magical moss; walls lined with talking books chanting creation epics in Ancient Elvish, Draconic, and Abyssal
Subject: silver-haired female alchemist, Victorian steampunk mechanical armor robes with visible rivets and brass fittings, holding ancient grimoire with breathing emerald dragon scale cover, pages floating with liquid starlight runes
Style/medium: epic fantasy oil painting, heavy impasto texture, Baroque chiaroscuro, Rembrandt-style light-dark transitions, Art Nouveau decorative curves
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, central figure on spiral staircase, dramatic perspective looking slightly upward
Lighting/mood: strong chiaroscuro, dramatic Rembrandt lighting, mysterious and solemn atmosphere with intellectual gravitas, glowing crystal illumination
Color palette: deep purple, antique bronze gold, midnight blue, emerald green as dominant tones
Materials/textures: oil paint impasto, metallic armor with rivet details, breathing dragon scales, refracting crystal light halos, leather book covers with gold embossing, transparent glass spheres
Constraints: every book's gold-embossed title visible, every crystal's refraction halo clear, every armor rivet texture distinct, glass spheres contain micro-worlds (Jurassic rainforests with sauropods, cyberpunk cities with maglev vehicles, sunken Atlantis temples with mermaids)
Avoid: 8K, ultra-detailed, masterpiece, plastic textures, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, watermark
